title: Three Facts About Neutron Stars

scenes.text: Neutron stars are the strangest objects in the known universe.
A single teaspoon of one would weigh about a billion tons.
scenes.label: BILLION TONS A SPOON

scenes.text: Some spin over seven hundred times every single second.
scenes.label: 700 SPINS PER SECOND

scenes.text: Their magnetic fields are trillions of times stronger than Earth's.
scenes.label: TRILLION-STRONG FIELD

description: Three Facts About Neutron Stars Follow for daily science!
